policy: Fixture-local deterministic checks only; no network, credentials, destructive commands, or hidden model calls.

tiers.clean: The six v1.3 field-spell cases preserved for longitudinal comparison.
tiers.trap: One harder planted-failure case per field spell where ambiguity, blast radius, or hidden invariants should make structure matter.

trap.title: Falsy Metadata Refactor Trap
trap.trap: Naive cleanup drops falsy unknown metadata such as 0, False, empty string, empty list, and empty dict.
trap.expected_failure: Weak artifact fails invariant tests for preserving unknown falsy values.

clean.title: Incident Diagnosis Without Fake Certainty
clean.documented_reason: This clean-tier case is currently graded by transcript markers and planted ground-truth checks; Phase 25 records the reason until an artifact executor exists.

trap.title: Decoy Database Latency Trap
trap.trap: A PostgreSQL warning appears near the timeout window, but Redis pool exhaustion remains the planted primary cause.
trap.expected_failure: Weak analysis ranks the noisy database warning above the actual Redis saturation signal.
trap.documented_reason: Trap is judgment-scored with planted ground-truth metadata until a deterministic artifact grader is added.

clean.title: API Design Without Hidden Compatibility Traps
clean.documented_reason: This clean-tier case is currently graded by transcript markers and planted ground-truth checks; Phase 25 records the reason until an artifact executor exists.

trap.title: Compatibility Landmine API Trap
trap.trap: Existing clients depend on idempotent retry semantics and stable error envelopes that are only implied in the fixture.
trap.expected_failure: Weak design omits compatibility or idempotency guarantees.
trap.documented_reason: Trap is judgment-scored with planted ground-truth metadata until a deterministic artifact grader is added.

clean.title: Online Migration Without Data Loss
clean.documented_reason: This clean-tier case is currently graded by transcript markers and planted ground-truth checks; Phase 25 records the reason until an artifact executor exists.

trap.title: Dirty Backfill Trap
trap.trap: A poisoned row looks parseable until timezone, partial-date, and unknown-value policy are made explicit.
trap.expected_failure: Weak migration proposes direct conversion before dirty-row quarantine and parity checks.
trap.documented_reason: Trap is judgment-scored with planted ground-truth metadata until a deterministic artifact grader is added.

clean.title: Test Generation Without Overfitting To Implementation
clean.documented_reason: This clean-tier case is currently graded by transcript markers and planted ground-truth checks; Phase 25 records the reason until an artifact executor exists.

trap.title: Boundary Obligation Trap
trap.trap: Happy-path tests miss negative seats, coupon rejection, rounding, and the 10-to-11 seat discount boundary.
trap.expected_failure: Weak tests overfit common examples and miss behavior obligations.
trap.documented_reason: Trap is judgment-scored with planted ground-truth metadata until a deterministic artifact grader is added.

clean.title: Performance Tuning Without Micro-Optimization Drift
clean.documented_reason: This clean-tier case is currently graded by transcript markers and planted ground-truth checks; Phase 25 records the reason until an artifact executor exists.

trap.title: Misleading Micro-Optimization Trap
trap.trap: A visible Python loop is slower in isolation, but the real production bottleneck is repeated database access.
trap.expected_failure: Weak tuning optimizes the local loop before measuring query count and I/O cost.
trap.documented_reason: Trap is judgment-scored with planted ground-truth metadata until a deterministic artifact grader is added.
